revision.text: {{polluted category}} {{Category articles containing non-English-language text|example = {{lang|ja|平仮名 / ひらがな}}|Japanese|ja|jpn}}

Boiler Gauges Glass Fiber Products Boiler Main Hole Packing, Klinger Sheets, Teflon and Gland Packings, Non Asbestos Packings ETC...We feel pleasure in introducing ourselves as Importers & Stockists. We mainly deal in Pressure Measuring Instruments, Temperature Measuring Instruments,Mechanical Instrumentation, Control Valves, Thermocouples, Process Fittings & Valves and Boiler Gauges Glass Fiber Products Boiler Main Hole Packing, Klinger Sheets, Teflon and Gland Packings, Non Asbestos Packings ETC...
ADDRESS: Shop#158/159 Ferozpur Wala Building Jeswani Street Seri Road Karachi PH: 02132465151 / 03452062862 / / 03422342367 / 03212779739 JAWADHAMID2010@HOTMAIL.COM. Facebook.com/boilerzonepakistan
